tracks.meaning: a program of study or training offered by an educational institution, typically lasting a specific duration
the direction or path along which something moves or progresses
a sequence of events or actions that unfold naturally or as part of a process
the main component or dish served as part of a meal
the duration or passage of time during which events occur
the ground or terrain that one travels over, particularly on horseback or on foot
the heading or direction a ship or boat is traveling
a track or racecourse where sporting events take place
a normal or expected way that events are progressing or expected to progress
the path or trajectory followed by a celestial body
a specific legal proceeding or track of action in a lawsuit or legal matter
the natural progression or expected development of a disease or medical condition
